title: Young vs Old
subtitle: Pensions rise. Paychecks stall. Generations stare across the table.

turns.prompt: Pension costs consume a third of the budget. Youth unemployment hits a decade high. Both generations demand priority.

choices.label: Raise the retirement age
choices.reaction: Older workers protest. Fiscal projections improve. Labour participation ticks up.

choices.label: Guarantee a first job for every young adult
choices.flavour: Payroll promises for the next generation.

delayed.headline: Youth programme costs compound as cohorts age

choices.reaction: Graduates sign contracts. Retirees ask who pays.

choices.label: Tax inherited wealth to fund both pensions and youth
choices.reaction: Young activists cheer. Family businesses warn of closure — then quietly relocate the patriarch's villa abroad.

turns.prompt: Early reforms land. Social media fills with generational memes — funny until they aren't.

choices.label: Top up pensions for the poorest retirees
choices.flavour: Protect those who cannot work longer.
choices.reaction: Fuel poverty eases for elders. Workers notice their own bills.

choices.label: Cancel a portion of student debt
choices.flavour: Give young adults a running start.
choices.reaction: Graduates celebrate. Taxpayers who never went to university grumble — then stop answering surveys.

choices.label: Import young workers through expanded visas
choices.flavour: Import the tax base you aren't birthing.
choices.reaction: Payroll taxes rise. Cultural friction follows.

turns.prompt: A viral clip shows a retiree and a graduate arguing in a clinic queue. Healthcare becomes the generational battlefield.

choices.label: Means-test pension benefits for wealthy retirees
choices.flavour: Ask those who can afford it to give back.
choices.reaction: Comfortable retirees feel punished. Savings rates shift.

choices.label: Introduce co-payments for non-urgent care
choices.flavour: Share the cost at the point of use.
choices.reaction: Waiting rooms thin for minor issues. Emergency demand stays high.

choices.label: Fund an intergenerational council with real budget power
choices.reaction: Talks drag — but violence fades from headlines.

turns.prompt: Demographic projections worsen. There are fewer workers than promised when today's pensions were designed.

memory_callbacks.text: Raising the retirement age bought time — not enough workers.
The jobs guarantee you funded did not grow the tax base fast enough.
The inheritance tax you raised froze family transfers — and housing turnover.

choices.label: Cut pension indexation to inflation
choices.reaction: Spreadsheets look better. Retirees feel betrayed — and vote accordingly.

choices.label: Raise payroll taxes on working-age adults
Tap sovereign wealth to cover the gap
choices.reaction: Both generations breathe easier — briefly. The demographic clock does not pause.

turns.prompt: Final reckoning. What contract did you leave between generations?

choices.label: Protect the elderly at the expense of future budgets
choices.reaction: Grandparents secure. Grandchildren inherit the bill.

choices.label: Prioritise investment in the young
choices.reaction: Schools and startups flourish. Pensioners discover they have to ask their grandchildren how to apply for benefits online.

choices.label: Formalise shared sacrifice across age groups
choices.reaction: Nobody is happy. The system holds.
